Western Canada LNG - GIS Map

Real basemap (switch top-right) + value-chain overlays. NGTL & Westcoast geometry is official Canada Energy Regulator data; Coastal GasLink is from OpenStreetMap; other corridors remain indicative. Click any feature for an excerpt.

Overview · click the map

Western Canada LNG value chain

Basemap is live tiles. Overlays load from layers.js; anything still approximate is flagged in its popup. Use the layer control to switch basemap (Topographic / Street / Satellite) and toggle layer groups.
